create-pdf-with-filled-arc-graph.title: Create PDF with Filled Arc Graph
create-pdf-with-filled-arc-graph.description: Shows how to generate a PDF, add a Graph container, draw a semi‑circle Arc with a custom fill color, and save the document.

add-unfilled-arc-with-line-width-and-das.title: Add Unfilled Arc with Custom Line Width and Dash Style to PDF
add-unfilled-arc-with-line-width-and-das.description: This example creates a PDF document, adds a graph container, and draws an unfilled arc with a specified line width and dash pattern.

add-filled-circle-to-pdf.title: Add Filled Circle to PDF with Aspose.Pdf
add-filled-circle-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF document, adding a Graph that covers the page, drawing a filled circle with a specified center and radius, and saving the file using Aspose.Pdf.

create-bezier-curve-in-pdf-graph.title: Create Bezier Curve in PDF Graph
create-bezier-curve-in-pdf-graph.description: Demonstrates how to draw a Bezier curve using four control points inside a Graph container and set its stroke color and line width in a PDF document.

add-filled-curve-to-pdf-graph.title: Add Filled Curve with Opacity and Border to PDF Graph
add-filled-curve-to-pdf-graph.description: Demonstrates creating a Graph in a PDF, drawing a Bezier curve, applying a semi‑transparent fill using ARGB, and setting the border color and thickness.

draw-straight-line-with-custom-cap.title: Draw Straight Line with Custom Cap in PDF
draw-straight-line-with-custom-cap.description: Demonstrates how to draw a straight line on a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf, configure its start and end points, and apply a line cap style.

add-colored-line-segments-to-pdf-graph.title: Add Colored Line Segments to a PDF Graph
add-colored-line-segments-to-pdf-graph.description: Shows how to create a PDF, add a Graph container, and draw consecutive line segments with varying colors to represent a continuous data series.

insert-rounded-rectangle-into-pdf-graph.title: Insert Rounded Rectangle into PDF Graph with Solid Fill
insert-rounded-rectangle-into-pdf-graph.description: Creates a PDF document, adds a Graph container, draws a rectangle with rounded corners, applies a solid fill color, and saves the file.

add-filled-rectangle-dashed-border-to-pd.title: Add Filled Rectangle with Dashed Border to PDF Graph
add-filled-rectangle-dashed-border-to-pd.description: Shows how to create a Graph, draw a rectangle with fill color, border color, line width, and dash pattern, and embed it into a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

create-ellipse-pdf-graph.title: Create an Ellipse in a PDF Graph with Custom Radii and Stroke Color
create-ellipse-pdf-graph.description: Demonstrates how to draw an ellipse on a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's Graph container, specifying horizontal and vertical radii and applying a red stroke color.

add-centered-graph-to-pdf-page.title: Add Centered Graph to PDF Page
add-centered-graph-to-pdf-page.description: Shows how to create a Graph, center it on a PDF page, add a rectangle shape, and insert the graph into the page using Aspose.Pdf.

place-graph-left-margin-offset.title: Place Graph on PDF Page with Left Margin Offset
place-graph-left-margin-offset.description: Shows how to add a Graph object to an existing PDF page and align it to the left margin using a specified horizontal offset.

set-graph-dimensions-pdf.title: Set Graph Width and Height in PDF
set-graph-dimensions-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a Graph object with specific width and height, optionally set its dimensions, add a rectangle shape, and save the PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-line-to-pdf-graph.title: Add a Dimension‑Specific Line to a PDF Graph
add-line-to-pdf-graph.description: Shows how to create a Graph, define a line with exact coordinates, set its color and thickness via GraphInfo, and embed the graph into a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

create-dimension-specific-rectangle.title: Create Dimension-Specific Rectangle in PDF
create-dimension-specific-rectangle.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's Graph object to draw a rectangle with exact dimensions and styling inside a PDF page.

adjust-rectangle-bounds-in-pdf.title: Adjust Rectangle Position Within PDF Page Bounds
adjust-rectangle-bounds-in-pdf.description: The example loads a PDF, draws a rectangle using a Graph, checks whether the shape fits inside the page, and moves it if it exceeds the page boundaries before saving the document.

log-graph-shapes-bounding-boxes.title: Log Bounding Boxes of Graph Shapes in PDF
log-graph-shapes-bounding-boxes.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF graph, adding rectangle, ellipse, and line shapes, iterating through the graph's shapes, and logging the bounding box coordinates for each shape.

rotate-graph-in-pdf.title: Rotate Graph Element in PDF
rotate-graph-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates creating a Graph, setting its rotation angle in degrees, adding a shape, and inserting it into a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

translate-graph-rectangle.title: Translate Rectangle Position in a PDF Graph
translate-graph-rectangle.description: Demonstrates how to move a rectangle shape inside a Graph container by adjusting its Left and Bottom coordinates, then saving the PDF.

non-uniform-graph-scaling.title: Non‑Uniform Graph Scaling in PDF
non-uniform-graph-scaling.description: Demonstrates how to scale a Graph element non‑uniformly on the X and Y axes using GraphInfo, adds a rectangle shape to visualize the effect, and saves the result as a PDF.

skew-graph-x-axis.title: Skew a Graph on the X Axis in a PDF
skew-graph-x-axis.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, create a Graph object, apply an X‑axis skew, and add a rectangle shape to visualize the slanted effect before saving the document.

apply-clipping-region-to-graph.title: Apply Clipping Region to a Graph in PDF
apply-clipping-region-to-graph.description: Demonstrates how to define a clipping rectangle using low‑level PDF operators and then draw a Graph whose shapes are rendered only inside that region.

create-semi-transparent-shape-graph.title: Create Semi-Transparent Shape Using Graph in PDF
create-semi-transparent-shape-graph.description: Demonstrates how to add a Graph to a PDF page, draw a rectangle with 50% opacity, and save the document.

add-shadow-effect-to-filled-rectangle.title: Add Shadow Effect to a Filled Rectangle in PDF
add-shadow-effect-to-filled-rectangle.description: Shows how to simulate a shadow for a filled rectangle by drawing an offset semi‑transparent rectangle behind it using Aspose.Pdf's Graph container.

create-star-shape-pdf.title: Create Custom Star Shape in PDF
create-star-shape-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to generate a star polygon with a configurable number of points, fill color, and stroke, and add it to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's drawing API.

add-regular-hexagon-to-pdf-graph.title: Add Regular Hexagon to PDF Graph
add-regular-hexagon-to-pdf-graph.description: Demonstrates creating a regular six‑sided polygon (hexagon) inside a Graph container, applying border color and thickness, and saving the PDF.

insert-dashed-polyline-annotation.title: Insert Dashed Polyline Annotation into PDF
insert-dashed-polyline-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to add a polyline annotation with multiple vertices to a PDF page and apply a custom dashed border style using Aspose.Pdf.

add-polygon-annotation-with-dashed-outli.title: Add Polygon Annotation with Dashed Outline to PDF
add-polygon-annotation-with-dashed-outli.description: Demonstrates creating a polygon annotation in a PDF, applying a solid interior color, and configuring a dashed border style using Aspose.Pdf.

create-layered-shapes-in-pdf.title: Create Layered Shapes in PDF with Aspose.Pdf Graph
create-layered-shapes-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add a layer to a PDF page, draw rectangle, ellipse, and line shapes inside a Graph, and optionally flatten the layer.

add-text-inside-graph-pdf.title: Add Text Inside a Graph with Font Styling
add-text-inside-graph-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to place a text fragment inside a Graph container in a PDF, set its font family, size, color, and position it at specific coordinates using Aspose.Pdf.

apply-background-image-to-pdf-graph.title: Apply Background Image to PDF Graph and Draw Shapes on Top
apply-background-image-to-pdf-graph.description: Demonstrates how to set a page background image and overlay a graph with rectangle and line shapes, ensuring the shapes appear above the background using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-rotate-scaled-image-pdf.title: Insert and Rotate Scaled Image in PDF
insert-rotate-scaled-image-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add an external image to a PDF page, scale it proportionally, and rotate it by a specified angle using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-with-single-default-page.title: Create PDF with a Single Default Page
create-pdf-with-single-default-page.description: Shows how to create a new PDF document, add a default‑size page, and save it using Aspose.Pdf.

add-graph-matching-page-size.title: Create a Graph Matching PDF Page Size
add-graph-matching-page-size.description: Shows how to instantiate an Aspose.Pdf.Drawing.Graph using the width and height of a PDF page and add it to the page's paragraph collection.

add-solid-red-rectangle-to-pdf-graph.title: Add Solid Red Rectangle to PDF Graph
add-solid-red-rectangle-to-pdf-graph.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF document, add a graph, and draw a solid red rectangle using absolute coordinates.

semi-transparent-ellipse-pdf.title: Create Semi-Transparent Ellipse in PDF
semi-transparent-ellipse-pdf.description: Shows how to draw an ellipse with a semi‑transparent fill color using Aspose.Pdf's Graph and Ellipse classes and save the result to a PDF file.

center-text-in-rectangle-pdf.title: Center Text Inside a Rectangle on a PDF
center-text-in-rectangle-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to draw a rectangle using a Graph container and place a centered TextFragment inside it on a PDF page with Aspose.Pdf.

enable-boundscheckmode-validate-graph-sh.title: Validate Graph Shape Placement with BoundsCheckMode
enable-boundscheckmode-validate-graph-sh.description: Demonstrates how to enable BoundsCheckMode.ThrowExceptionIfDoesNotFit on an Aspose.Pdf.Drawing.Graph so that adding a shape that exceeds the graph's dimensions throws an exception. The code creates a PDF, adds a graph with a fitting rectangle, and shows the validation behavior.

handle-shape-bounds-exceptions.title: Handle Shape Bounds Exceptions in PDF Graph
handle-shape-bounds-exceptions.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF with a graph, adding rectangle and line shapes, and catching BoundsOutOfRangeException to log coordinates of shapes that exceed the graph limits.

add-non-overlapping-rectangles-to-pdf-gr.title: Add Non-Overlapping Rectangles to a PDF Graph
add-non-overlapping-rectangles-to-pdf-gr.description: Creates a PDF, adds a Graph canvas, draws multiple rectangles of varying sizes while checking for intersections to avoid overlap, and saves the document.

add-rectangle-ellipse-graph-to-pdf.title: Add Rectangle and Ellipse Shapes to PDF using Graph
add-rectangle-ellipse-graph-to-pdf.description: Creates a PDF document, adds a graph container, draws a rectangle and an ellipse with distinct fill and stroke colors, and saves the file.

export-pdf-to-memory-stream-and-save.title: Export PDF to MemoryStream and Save to Disk
export-pdf-to-memory-stream-and-save.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, saving it into a MemoryStream, and then writing the stream contents to a file on disk.

add-graph-with-shapes-to-pdf.title: Add Graph with Shapes to a PDF Page
add-graph-with-shapes-to-pdf.description: Loads an existing PDF, adds a new blank page, creates a Graph object, draws a rectangle, ellipse and line with styling, and saves the modified document.

add-graph-watermark-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Graph Watermark Rectangle to PDF Pages
add-graph-watermark-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to batch‑process PDF files, adding the same graph containing a rectangle watermark to every page using Aspose.Pdf.

parallel-gradient-ellipse-pdf.title: Parallel Processing of PDFs with Gradient Ellipse Graphs
parallel-gradient-ellipse-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to process multiple PDF files concurrently using Parallel.ForEach and add a graph containing gradient‑filled ellipses to each page with Aspose.Pdf.

configure-graph-border-rectangle-dash-st.title: Set Graph Border and Rectangle Dash Style in PDF
configure-graph-border-rectangle-dash-st.description: Demonstrates how to configure the Graph's outer border and customize a rectangle's line width, color, and dash pattern before adding it to a PDF page.

set-rectangle-fill-opacity-50-argb.title: Set Rectangle Fill Opacity to 50% Using ARGB Color
set-rectangle-fill-opacity-50-argb.description: Shows how to draw a rectangle in a PDF with a semi‑transparent fill by using an ARGB color value and verifies the fill color.

create-sample-graph-pdf.title: Create Sample Graph and Add to PDF Page
create-sample-graph-pdf.description: Shows how to build a predefined Graph with a rectangle, ellipse, line, and title, then insert it into a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

serialize-pdf-to-byte-array.title: Serialize PDF to Byte Array for Transmission
serialize-pdf-to-byte-array.description: Loads an existing PDF that contains a graph, saves it into a memory stream, and extracts a byte array suitable for network transmission.

deserialize-pdf-add-graph-label.title: Deserialize PDF Byte Array and Add Graph with Text Label
deserialize-pdf-add-graph-label.description: The example shows how to load a PDF from a byte array into an Aspose.Pdf Document, create a Graph with shapes, and place a text label pointing to the graph on the same page.

toggle-graph-boundscheckmode.title: Toggle Graph BoundsCheckMode in PDF
toggle-graph-boundscheckmode.description: Demonstrates how to switch the Graph shape collection's bounds‑check mode between strict (throw exception) and ignore based on a user setting, and saves a PDF containing a rectangle that exceeds the graph size.

pdf-report-with-colored-bar-graph.title: Create PDF Report with Colored Bar Graph and Legend
pdf-report-with-colored-bar-graph.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF document that contains a simple bar‑graph made of colored rectangles and a corresponding legend using Aspose.Pdf.

add-rounded-rectangle-with-fill.title: Add Rounded Rectangle with Fill to PDF
add-rounded-rectangle-with-fill.description: Shows how to insert a rectangle with rounded corners and a solid fill into an existing PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-rotated-ellipse-to-pdf.title: Add Rotated Ellipse to PDF
add-rotated-ellipse-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates creating an ellipse shape, applying a 45° rotation using GraphInfo, and adding it to a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-collage-multiple-graphs.title: Create PDF Collage with Multiple Graphs
create-pdf-collage-multiple-graphs.description: Shows how to add several Graph objects at different coordinates on a single PDF page, each containing different shapes, to build a collage.

clip-shapes-within-graph-region.title: Clip Shapes Within a Graph Region in PDF
clip-shapes-within-graph-region.description: Demonstrates defining a clipping rectangle for a Graph and adding shapes that are confined to that region when creating a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.

measure-ellipse-bounding-box.title: Measure Ellipse Bounding Box after Gradient Fill
measure-ellipse-bounding-box.description: Demonstrates how to add an ellipse to a PDF, apply a solid placeholder fill (as gradients aren't directly supported), and programmatically obtain its content bounding box for correct placement.

create-multi-page-pdf-with-full-page-gra.title: Create Multi‑Page PDF with Full‑Page Graphs
create-multi-page-pdf-with-full-page-gra.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF containing multiple pages, each with a Graph object sized exactly to the page dimensions.

add-rectangle-with-bounds-checking.title: Add Rectangle with Bounds Checking and Error Logging to PDF
add-rectangle-with-bounds-checking.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF, adding a rectangle shape inside a Graph container, manually checking page bounds, handling a custom exception, and logging detailed shape coordinates before saving the document.

configure-shape-fill-colors-pdf-graph.title: Configure Shape Fill Colors for PDF Graphs
configure-shape-fill-colors-pdf-graph.description: Demonstrates loading a JSON configuration to set default fill colors for rectangle, ellipse, and line shapes in an Aspose.Pdf graph and saving the result as a PDF.

add-dashed-rectangle-to-pdf-graph.title: Add Dashed Rectangle to PDF Graph
add-dashed-rectangle-to-pdf-graph.description: Creates a PDF document, adds a full‑page graph, and draws a rectangle with a 2‑point dashed border on the graph.

out-of-bounds-rectangle-throws-exception.title: Out-of-Bounds Rectangle Throws Exception in Graph
out-of-bounds-rectangle-throws-exception.description: Demonstrates creating a Graph, adding a rectangle that exceeds its bounds, and asserting that an exception is thrown using a unit test.

batch-insert-logo-graph-into-pdfs.title: Batch Insert Logo Graph into PDF Files
batch-insert-logo-graph-into-pdfs.description: Loads each PDF from an input folder, creates a Graph with a rectangle representing a company logo, adds the graph to the first page, and saves the updated PDFs to an output folder.

create-pdf-with-graph.title: Create PDF with Graph and Rectangle in Memory
create-pdf-with-graph.description: Shows how to generate a PDF document in memory using Aspose.Pdf, add a Graph container with a rectangle shape, and return the PDF as a byte array.

add-graph-to-pdf.title: Add Graph to PDF Document
add-graph-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading an existing PDF, creating an Aspose.Pdf.Drawing.Graph with a rectangle shape, positioning it on a page, and saving the modified document.

add-rectangle-radial-gradient-pdf.title: Add Rectangle with Radial Gradient to PDF
add-rectangle-radial-gradient-pdf.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF, adding a Graph container, drawing a rectangle and applying a radial gradient (with a semi‑transparent fallback) using GraphInfo.

create-pdf-pages-with-proportional-graph.title: Create PDF Pages with Proportional Graph Shapes
create-pdf-pages-with-proportional-graph.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF where each page contains a graph with rectangle, ellipse, and line shapes sized proportionally to the page dimensions.

map-shape-colors-to-pdf-graph.title: Map Shape IDs to Fill Colors in a PDF Graph
map-shape-colors-to-pdf-graph.description: Demonstrates using a Dictionary to associate shape identifiers with fill colors and applying them while constructing a Graph containing rectangle, ellipse, and circle shapes in an Aspose.Pdf document.

add-ellipse-with-border-and-centered-tex.title: Add Ellipse with Border and Centered Text to PDF
add-ellipse-with-border-and-centered-tex.description: Demonstrates how to draw a semi‑transparent ellipse with a thick border and place a centered text fragment inside it using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-graph-styled-text.title: Create PDF with Graph and Styled Text Fragments
create-pdf-graph-styled-text.description: Demonstrates how to add a Graph container with a rectangle shape to a PDF page and place multiple text fragments using different fonts, sizes, and colors.

scale-graph-shapes-150-percent.title: Scale Graph Shapes by 150% Using GraphInfo
scale-graph-shapes-150-percent.description: Demonstrates how to apply a 150 % scaling transformation to all shapes in an Aspose.Pdf.Drawing.Graph by setting the GraphInfo ScalingRateX and ScalingRateY before rendering the PDF.

add-rectangle-with-drop-shadow-to-pdf.title: Add Rectangle with Drop Shadow to PDF
add-rectangle-with-drop-shadow-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to draw a rectangle with a semi‑transparent offset shadow using Aspose.Pdf's Graph container and save it as a PDF.

create-pdf-graph-with-border-colors.title: Create PDF Graph with Shape Border Colors
create-pdf-graph-with-border-colors.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF containing a graph where each shape's border color is retrieved from a lookup table. Uses Aspose.Pdf's graph and drawing classes to add rectangles, an ellipse, and a line with custom colors.

insert-graph-into-pdf-footer.title: Insert Graph into PDF Footer
insert-graph-into-pdf-footer.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF, add a footer, place a Graph object inside the footer with specific margins and alignment, and save the document using Aspose.Pdf.

create-horizontal-bar-chart-pdf.title: Create Horizontal Bar Chart in PDF
create-horizontal-bar-chart-pdf.description: Shows how to generate a simple horizontal bar chart in a PDF by adding rectangle shapes to a Graph container using Aspose.Pdf.

graph-filled-and-outline-shapes.title: Create PDF with Filled and Outline Shapes Using Graph
graph-filled-and-outline-shapes.description: Shows how to draw filled rectangles, stroke‑only outlines, and a line on a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's Graph container.

export-graph-to-pdf.title: Export Graph to PDF Document
export-graph-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF document, add a Graph with a rectangle shape, and save it as a new PDF file using Aspose.Pdf.
